mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly CPIAUCSL reading above 215 indicates elevated inflation expectations, prompting central bank tightening that depresses equity valuations and generates negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 215 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in GDP (GDPC1) and industrial production (INDPRO) signals robust economic expansion, driving corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through demand-side momentum.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns in periods of simultaneous GDPC1 and INDPRO growth are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A high unemployment rate (UNRATE > 8%) signals weak labor market conditions that depress consumer spending and corporate profits, generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days in a high-unemployment regime.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE exceeds 8% despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Rising housing starts (HOUST) indicate strong demand for residential construction, boosting related industries and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through demand-side momentum.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of rising HOUST are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly RSAFS reading above 340,000 million indicates strong consumer spending, driving corporate revenues and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through demand-side momentum.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances where RSAFS exceeds 340,000 despite the signal.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth (PAYEMS) combined with low unemployment (UNRATE) indicates a tight labor market that drives wage inflation and corporate cost pressures, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days through labor-market dynamics.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns in periods of simultaneous PAYEMS growth and UNRATE decline are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) signals strong supply-side capacity utilization, boosting corporate profits and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days through supply-side momentum.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns in periods of rising INDPRO are not significantly positive (t-test p > 0.05).
